2026-04-27T15:55:24.7924892Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-27T15:55:24.7925515Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-27T15:55:24.7925953Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-27T15:55:24.7926354Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-27T15:55:24.7926667Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-27T15:55:24.7926909Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-27T15:55:24.7927068Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-27T15:55:24.7927248Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-27T15:55:24.7927416Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-27T15:55:24.7927647Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-27T15:55:24.7927848Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-27T15:55:24.7928143Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-27T15:55:24.7928418Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

2026-04-27T15:56:47.0825331Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-27T15:56:18.975510804Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":58711,\"title\":\"[MPG] Promote OperationStatusResult to a fully inheritable system type\",\"body\":\"### Context\\n`Azure.ResourceManager.Models.OperationStatusResult` is already registered in [`KnownManagementTypes._idToInheritableSystemTypeMap`](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt/generator/Azure.Generator.Management/src/Primitives/KnownManagementTypes.cs#L46):\\n```csharp\\n[`Azure.ResourceManager.CommonTypes.OperationStatusResult`] = typeof(OperationStatusResult),\\n```\\nand `ManagementTypeFactory.CreateModelCore` has a code path (Case B) for emitting a derived class when `model.BaseModel` matches an inheritable-system-type id:\\n```csharp\\nif (model.BaseModel is { } baseModel \\u0026amp;\\u0026amp;\\n    KnownManagementTypes.TryGetInheritableSystemType(baseModel.CrossLanguageDefinitionId, out var inheritableType))\\n{\\n    CreateModel(baseModel);\\n    return InheritableSystemObjectModelProvider.CreateDerived(model, inheritableType);\\n}\\n```\\n\\n### Problem\\nIn practice this path does not produce working code for `OperationStatusResult` like it does for `ResourceData` / `TrackedResourceData`. Two observable failure modes when an RP spec declares e.g.\\n\\n```typespec\\n@@clientName(OperationStatus, `RedisOperationStatus`, `csharp`);\\nmodel OperationStatus extends Azure.ResourceManager.CommonTypes.OperationStatusResult {\\n  properties?: Record;\\n}\\n```\\n\\n1. **Without forcing inheritance** — generated `RedisOperationStatus.cs` is emitted with **no base type** (case B not firing for this id), causing ApiCompat to fail:\\n   \\u0026gt; `CannotRemoveBaseTypeOrInterface : \\u0026#39;RedisOperationStatus\\u0026#39; does not inherit from base type \\u0026#39;OperationStatusResult\\u0026#39; in the implementation but it does in the contract.`\\n\\n2. **When the inheritance IS produced** (e.g. by experimentation in the generator), the emitted `Deserialize` / serialization code refers to internal members of `OperationStatusResult` that are not accessible cross-assembly (the type lives in `Azure.ResourceManager.Models` and only exposes `IPersistableModel`/`IJsonModel`), producing build errors. Same root cause already tracked in #58709 for `OperationStatusResultOperationSource`.\\n\\n### Ask\\nPromote `OperationStatusResult` to a **fully** inheritable system type on par with `ResourceData` / `TrackedResourceData`:\\n\\n- Detect spec-level `extends Azure.ResourceManager.CommonTypes.OperationStatusResult` and emit `: OperationStatusResult` on the derived class.\\n- Generate serialization that uses only public/cross-assembly-accessible APIs (`ModelReaderWriter.Read` / `IJsonModel` virtuals + `JsonModelWriteCore` override for inherited fields), the way the Custom partials in shipping SDKs do.\\n\\n### Workaround (Redis)\\nHand-rolled `src/Customization/Models/RedisOperationStatus.cs` that re-declares the base and re-emits `JsonModelWriteCore`. See PR #56877.\\n\\n### Related\\n- #58709 — `OperationStatusResultOperationSource` calls inaccessible `Deserialize` on cross-assembly common types.\",\"state\":\"open\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/58711\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"haiyuazhang\",\"id\":1924967,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/haiyuazhang\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/1924967?v=4\"},\"author_association\":\"MEMBER\",\"labels\":[\"Mgmt\",\"CodeGen\"],\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":1,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":1},\"created_at\":\"2026-04-27T15:53:29Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-04-27T15:53:29Z\"}","type":"text"}]}}}
2026-04-27T15:56:47.0839904Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-27T15:56:18.986797635Z","direction":"OUT","type":"REQUEST","server_id":"github","method":"tools/call","payload":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"arguments":{"issue_number":58711,"method":"get","owner":"Azure","repo":"azure-sdk-for-net"},"name":"issue_read"}}}
2026-04-27T15:56:47.0856501Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-27T15:56:19.236787152Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":58711,\"title\":\"[MPG] Promote OperationStatusResult to a fully inheritable system type\",\"body\":\"### Context\\n`Azure.ResourceManager.Models.OperationStatusResult` is already registered in [`KnownManagementTypes._idToInheritableSystemTypeMap`](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt/generator/Azure.Generator.Management/src/Primitives/KnownManagementTypes.cs#L46):\\n```csharp\\n[`Azure.ResourceManager.CommonTypes.OperationStatusResult`] = typeof(OperationStatusResult),\\n```\\nand `ManagementTypeFactory.CreateModelCore` has a code path (Case B) for emitting a derived class when `model.BaseModel` matches an inheritable-system-type id:\\n```csharp\\nif (model.BaseModel is { } baseModel \\u0026amp;\\u0026amp;\\n    KnownManagementTypes.TryGetInheritableSystemType(baseModel.CrossLanguageDefinitionId, out var inheritableType))\\n{\\n    CreateModel(baseModel);\\n    return InheritableSystemObjectModelProvider.CreateDerived(model, inheritableType);\\n}\\n```\\n\\n### Problem\\nIn practice this path does not produce working code for `OperationStatusResult` like it does for `ResourceData` / `TrackedResourceData`. Two observable failure modes when an RP spec declares e.g.\\n\\n```typespec\\n@@clientName(OperationStatus, `RedisOperationStatus`, `csharp`);\\nmodel OperationStatus extends Azure.ResourceManager.CommonTypes.OperationStatusResult {\\n  properties?: Record;\\n}\\n```\\n\\n1. **Without forcing inheritance** — generated `RedisOperationStatus.cs` is emitted with **no base type** (case B not firing for this id), causing ApiCompat to fail:\\n   \\u0026gt; `CannotRemoveBaseTypeOrInterface : \\u0026#39;RedisOperationStatus\\u0026#39; does not inherit from base type \\u0026#39;OperationStatusResult\\u0026#39; in the implementation but it does in the contract.`\\n\\n2. **When the inheritance IS produced** (e.g. by experimentation in the generator), the emitted `Deserialize` / serialization code refers to internal members of `OperationStatusResult` that are not accessible cross-assembly (the type lives in `Azure.ResourceManager.Models` and only exposes `IPersistableModel`/`IJsonModel`), producing build errors. Same root cause already tracked in #58709 for `OperationStatusResultOperationSource`.\\n\\n### Ask\\nPromote `OperationStatusResult` to a **fully** inheritable system type on par with `ResourceData` / `TrackedResourceData`:\\n\\n- Detect spec-level `extends Azure.ResourceManager.CommonTypes.OperationStatusResult` and emit `: OperationStatusResult` on the derived class.\\n- Generate serialization that uses only public/cross-assembly-accessible APIs (`ModelReaderWriter.Read` / `IJsonModel` virtuals + `JsonModelWriteCore` override for inherited fields), the way the Custom partials in shipping SDKs do.\\n\\n### Workaround (Redis)\\nHand-rolled `src/Customization/Models/RedisOperationStatus.cs` that re-declares the base and re-emits `JsonModelWriteCore`. See PR #56877.\\n\\n### Related\\n- #58709 — `OperationStatusResultOperationSource` calls inaccessible `Deserialize` on cross-assembly common types.\",\"state\":\"open\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/58711\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"haiyuazhang\",\"id\":1924967,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/haiyuazhang\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/1924967?v=4\"},\"author_association\":\"MEMBER\",\"labels\":[\"Mgmt\",\"CodeGen\"],\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":1,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":1},\"created_at\":\"2026-04-27T15:53:29Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-04-27T15:53:29Z\"}","type":"text"}]}}}
